sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74442" key="o(ph|ou=n" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁπῃοῦν</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὅπῃπερ</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὅπῃ ποτέ,</orth> <sense id="n74442.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὅπη</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">111</biblScope></bibl>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὅπης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἕρπης</ref> </xr> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11</biblScope></bibl>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπητίδιον</orth>, <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀπήτιον</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ὄπεας.</ref> </xr> </sense> </entryFree>
